data.title: RedotPay secures unicorn status with $47M funding from Coinbase Ventures, Galaxy Ventures, and Vertex Ventures.
data.description: RedotPay, a company specializing in stablecoin payments, recently announced that it has reached a valuation of over $1 billion, making it a fintech unicorn. This milestone was achieved following a successful funding round that raised $47 million. The round saw investment from prominent venture capital firms including Coinbase Ventures, Galaxy Ventures, and Vertex Ventures.

data.title: Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, partners with Vietnam in Dubai. Deputy PM Binh met with Bybit CEO Zhou.
data.description: In Dubai on September 25, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, hosted an official working session with Permanent Deputy Prime Minister of Vietnam, H.E. Nguyen Hoa Binh. The meeting, which involved Ben Zhou, saw a discussion on various topics.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) price tests lower Bollinger Band, drops 2.68% to $3.92. Key support at $3.78, signaling more weakness.
data.description: The price of DOT has decreased by 2.68% to $3.92, nearing a critical support level at $3.78, with technical indicators suggesting a further decline in the near future.

data.title: Intertek awards standard certificates to Novele's EnergyBoard product in Europe and North America.
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 25, 2025, global Total Quality Assurance provider Intertek awarded a set of certificates to Novele, Inc. for their EnergyBoard energy storage product. Among the certifications granted was one for Large-Scale Fire Burn VOC. This recognition underscores Intertek's acknowledgment of Novele's advancements in the energy storage sector, highlighting their commitment to quality and innovation.

data.title: MATIC trading around $0.38 faces challenges amid mixed signals, caution advised for traders due to weak bullish trend.
data.description: The token MATIC is currently trading at $0.38 with a downward momentum, despite being classified as having a weak bullish trend. Traders are advised to proceed with caution based on technical indicators.

data.title: IREN Ltd's stock jumps 4.48% to $49.25 in after-hours trading, a 537.03% six-month rally fueled by AI cloud expansion with a $674M investment in GPUs.
data.description: Shares of IREN Ltd (NASDAQ: IREN) are surging, with a 4.48% increase in after-hours trading reaching $49.25 following a 12.86% gain in the previous regular session. Over the past six months, the stock has skyrocketed by 537.03%. The company recently announced a significant expansion in its cloud computing power, doubling its AI cloud capacity to 23,000 GPUs. This expansion was achieved through strategic hardware purchases, including 7,100 Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) B300 GPUs, 4,200 Nvidia B200 GPUs, and 1,100 AMD MI350X GPUs, representing a total investment of approximately $674 million. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: DOGE price at $0.23 (-1.77%) after ETF launch; whale accumulation indicates underlying strength.
data.description: Trading at $0.23, Dogecoin experienced a 1.77% decline. Despite the launch of a new ETF failing to immediately boost prices, the accumulation of a significant amount of DOGE by large holders indicates strong underlying support for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Galaxy Digital CEO predicts Solana will dominate financial markets due to its speed. Solana processes 950 tx/s vs. Ethereum's 18 tx/s.
data.description: During an interview, Galaxy Digital Inc. CEO Mike Novogratz expressed his confidence in Solana (SOL) as the dominant player in financial markets. Novogratz emphasized Solana's speed and suitability for financial markets, predicting it would capture the majority of market share in the future. He highlighted Solana's position as the fastest network currently available, surpassing Ethereum (ETH) in transaction speed and capacity. Solana reportedly averages around 950 transactions per second, significantly higher than Ethereum's 18 tx/s. Novogratz's remarks were made on Anthony Pompliano's podcast. This information was shared by blockchain analytics firm Chainspect.

data.title: Beroe receives $34m investment for procurement intelligence, enhancing product development for global managers.
data.description: Beroe, a leading provider of procurement decision intelligence worldwide, has recently disclosed a successful funding round of $34 million. The funds obtained will be utilized to expedite product development aimed at providing valuable insights for procurement professionals on a global scale. This announcement was made on September 25, 2025, with operations spanning across Chennai, India, and Raleigh, North Carolina.
